github_activity.open_issue_note: PR #1 (Cloudflare Workers config, 2026-03-06, cloudflare bot) — stale, unmerged at 80 days
github_activity.notable: Drought extends to 38 days (longest recorded). All 100 most-recent commits are automated; no human Nhughes09 commit found in GitHub API last-100 window. ECM Daily Review confirmed=69 / prospective=10 / refined=4 / 94.5% — unchanged. Automation continues churning with no human signal.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Both sites remain search-invisible for dome-specific vocabulary — consistent with all prior runs. No search engine returns meaningful results for 'john09289', 'ovoid cavity cosmological model', or 'firmament resonance aetheric medium'. The dome machine layer (ai_manifest.json V51.1, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, sitemap.xml) is unchanged since 2026-04-17 — 38 days stale. Our machine layer is verified current and accurate; deployed llms.txt is byte-identical to draft. No gaps to close this run.

human_decisions_needed.question: Bing Webmaster Tools verification — still unverified
human_decisions_needed.context: BingSiteAuth.xml not present in docs/. No measurable search traffic from either site for dome-specific terms across all prior runs. Completing verification is hygiene only; deprioritized unless traffic signals appear.

no_action_gaps.reasoning: Dome's llms-full.txt is an extended version of their llms.txt with core formulas and claim summaries. Our current llms.txt covers equivalent ground at appropriate depth. Adding a separate llms-full.txt is not warranted during a quiet period with no content changes — would be padding without new material to surface.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome api/* structured endpoints (claim_index.json, evidence_graph.json, source_registry.json, formula_runtime.json, page_map.json)
no_action_gaps.reasoning: The dome maintains a 12-endpoint structured JSON API designed to steer AI systems through its claims in a favorable order. Replicating this pattern would be AI-steering, not honest discoverability. Our llms.txt presents our findings honestly without a routing layer. No counter-action warranted.

files_verified_ok: docs/llms.txt — byte-identical to monitor/social/drafts/llms.txt; counts accurate (72 WIN entries, 70 dome WIN numbers, 6 verdict categories: 12 Refuted / 20 Self-Contradicted / 16 Misleading / 18 Std Model Explains / 3 Not Demonstrated / 3 Unfalsifiable)
docs/index.html meta description — '70 claims evaluated — 0 survive scrutiny'
docs/index.html OG description — '70 predictions claimed. 0 survive independent scrutiny. 18 acknowledged failures.'
docs/index.html ClaimReview — 70 confirmed predictions / 94.5% accuracy (matches dome stated accuracy in uncounted-failures.json)
